race.comment: Track pattern will be key for DARK SIMBA (3) but if they can make ground over this trip he'll go close. He's always promised good ability and really came away from his rivals late at Bendigo over this trip to score by a dominant 2.75 lengths. Radley claims 2kg and with even luck he'll be too strong late. BLUE WILLOW (16) got home well into third at Sandown Hillside last time out behind an in-form horse and gets in with just 51kg after the very handy claim for Johnstone. She'll be very hard to hold out. FUNCHAL (1) resumes for a new yard. Her Perth form says she'll measure up but watch the market. PRESTIGE FOREVER (4) next best if he can cross over and find the front.
